# LarryBrain Research Note

Public sources credited:

- LarryBrain marketplace repo: https://github.com/OllieWazza/LarryBrain-Skill
- LarryBrain marketplace: https://www.larrybrain.com/
- Larry Marketing skill API: https://www.larrybrain.com/api/skills/install?slug=larry-marketing&mode=files

## Useful principles adopted

- Treat content as an experiment loop: create, publish manually, track, diagnose, iterate.
- Onboard deeply before generation.
- Ask about the product, audience, niche, visual style, and conversion goal before creating assets.
- Research competitors and gap opportunities when permissioned.
- Save reusable style and prompt anchors.
- Separate reach diagnostics from conversion diagnostics.
- Use performance records to decide whether to double down, revise, or reset.

## Threads-native adaptation

Larry's public skill is TikTok/app-marketing oriented. Viral Carousel Maker adapts the learning-loop principles to Threads carousels:

- No TikTok account warmup.
- No Postiz posting dependency.
- No direct social publishing.
- No RevenueCat requirement.
- No baked-in TikTok slideshow assumptions.
- No automatic browser staging.

Instead, this skill produces Threads-ready production packs and a local manual metrics ledger.

## Public-data policy

Credit public inspiration. Do not commit private corpora, private performance logs, API keys, or copied proprietary prompt files. Derived principles are allowed; raw private source material is not.
